text: Computer vision enables computers to understand and interpret visual information from the world around them. Two important tasks in computer vision are image recognition and object detection. Image recognition identifies what is in a picture, such as a cat or a tree. Object detection goes further by locating objects and drawing boxes around them in an image. These technologies have many practical applications. In healthcare, they help doctors analyse medical scans. In retail, they can track inventory. One of the most exciting applications is in self-driving cars, where computer vision helps vehicles recognise traffic signs, pedestrians, and other cars to navigate safely.
